redemptionType: Daily primary redemption via Securitize / Transfer Agent
primaryRedemptionChannel: Securitize website / Transfer Agent redemption workflow
secondaryLiquidity: Limited secondary liquidity. DeFiLlama reports 24h BUIDL volume of $0, CEX volume of $0, DEX volume of $0, and on-chain liquidity of $320,081 on Raydium AMM. CoinGecko also reports $0 24h trading volume and warns that token liquidity is likely to be low.
liquidityNotes: BUIDL has daily primary-market redemption through the Securitize / Transfer Agent workflow, with tokens required to be received in the Transfer Agent redemption wallet before 3:00 PM ET and USD redemptions processed through the BUIDL fund. RWA.xyz lists minimum redemption amount as 250,000 USD and redemption fee as 0%. Liquidity score is set at the lower bound of the T+1/daily redemption band because redemption is not permissionless instant liquidity, investor access is restricted to U.S. Qualified Purchasers, transfer/whitelist controls exist, and secondary market liquidity is very limited with $0 reported 24h volume. SEC Form D lists minimum outside investment as 100,000 USD, while RWA.xyz primary-market terms list minimum investment as 5,000,000 USD and minimum redemption as 250,000 USD; this file uses RWA.xyz for operational redemption terms and SEC for legal offering context.
